name: libreoffice
description: Live LibreOffice Writer editing from Codex: MCP tools talking to a LibreOffice extension over HTTP localhost:8765.

interface.shortDescription: Live-edit LibreOffice Writer documents from Codex
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to an open LibreOffice Writer document through a local MCP bridge and LibreOffice extension. Supports live reading, formatting, tables, styles, headers, footers, document inspection, conversion, and safe batch editing workflows.
